turns.text:
Speaker 1: Good morning off to basketball game
Speaker 2: Morning. I'm off shopping with friends after brunch.
Speaker 1: Eggs are the best for brunch
Speaker 2: They truly are. One of these days, I'm going to have to learn how to cook.
Speaker 1: Yes what is your food would you like to cook
Speaker 2: I do not cook at all, so I'll start with the basics.
Speaker 1: Maybe a simple meal like a small brunch.
Speaker 2: Oh, I don't know. I'm more interested in getting my bmw paid off right now.
Speaker 1: Yes I want to purchase a new car a different color than black
Speaker 2: Mine is purple. Next time, I'm getting a pink maclaren.
Speaker 1: That seem nice that car seem to be nice in black
Speaker 2: I like mine to have original colors.

Speaker 1: I went to the basketball game that I mentioned, it was very thrilling.
Speaker 2: Awesome. Who were the teams?
Speaker 1: It was a couple of high school teams from the area. They're really good for such young players.
Speaker 2: Oh that's fun. I've been to a few high school basketball games. How is your car?
Speaker 1: It purrs like a kitten! Spent a lot of time on the body work as well
Speaker 2: Nice! My BMW is getting a bit old, thinking of buying a new car soon.
Speaker 1: Sweet! What are you thinking of getting?
Speaker 2: Maybe an SUV? I'd like something different. Any recommendations?
Speaker 1: The Range Rover Sport is pretty slick! Though it depends on your price range really.
Speaker 2: Range Rovers are a bit pricey, but I'll have to check them out. What make/model is your car?
Speaker 1: Got me an older mustang
Speaker 2: Oh love those cars! I really wanted a mustang convertible as a kid.

Speaker 1: I got work done on my older mustang.
Speaker 2: That is so exciting. What work did you get done?
Speaker 1: I had to put it back in driving condition; new engine, fixed the brakes etc. cost me a fortune.
Speaker 2: I bet, what else needs to be done to it?
Speaker 1: Need to change the tires, and fix the blown motor; just too much but worth it. Have you made up your mind on what SUV you want to get?
Speaker 2: I haven't decided yet but am considering a Nissan Kicks.
Speaker 1: That's a good car and not really expensive. Is it fuel efficient though?
Speaker 2: It is not bad, the average is 36mpg.
Speaker 1: Not bad at all; I hear it is very roomy-spacious; you should really consider.
Speaker 2: Yeah, I think I will. How was the basketball game that you went to?
Speaker 1: It was okay; my team did not win so I was a little disappointed.
Speaker 2: Oh, do you have plans to go to another one?

Speaker 1: Just got the invoice for the rest of the work that needs to be done on my car... so expensive!
Speaker 2: Ouch? How much? Do you have the money to pay for it?
Speaker 1: $2000 for the front exterior. I have it, but just barely. I know its a lot, but I know it will pay off in the end.
Speaker 2: That is a lot. Pretty painful, but you love that car!
Speaker 1: I do and its not that bad considering its an original 1964. Not too many of those around any more.
Speaker 2: Certainly not. It is a very unique. Do you show it in car shows?
Speaker 1: Not yet, but I certainly plan on it. If I spend as much as I think its gonna cost, someone's gonna see it lol. Are you still considering a Nissan Kicks?
Speaker 2: I will come see if you show it off! I am liking the Kicks. What do you think of it?
Speaker 1: I think they're nice. Can you get one with a convertible top?
Speaker 2: I haven't looked into that. I don't generally like convertibles because they mess up your hair.
Speaker 1: Isn't that the truth! I don't think you can go wrong with a Nissan. They're very dependable. What color do you like?
Speaker 2: I like to be wild. I need something cool to match my purple bmw.
